_comment: Phase 48 / A11Y-03 — Wave 0 SCAFFOLD. PLACEHOLDER minScore — plan 05 reseeds it from a real baseline run (floor set a few points UNDER measured actual, coverage-ratchet philosophy). PUBLIC routes only (headless can't auth; no authed URLs -> no info-disclosure to temporary-public-storage). lhci runs against the PRODUCTION next build via `npm run start` (NOT next dev — Pitfall 6).
